title: behavioral-ddos-profile
description: Contains details about a Behavioral DDoS profile.

bypassCondition.description: Exempts specific clients from being processed by the Behavioral DDoS profile.

atomicConditions.description: Specify one or more types of conditions to match on. You can match on client lists, request headers, or both.

oneOf.description: Collects data needed for condition matches on request headers.

className.description: Choose `RequestHeaderCondition` to match a header from the requesting client to the specified header.

name.description: Use `name` to check whether the specified header exists.

nameWildcard.description: Whether to interpret `?` and `*` as wildcards in the specified `name`.

positiveMatch.description: __Read-only__ Whether the condition triggers on a match or lack of match.

value.description: Unique header values. Use both `value` and `name` to check whether the requesting client’s header matches the specified headers.

valueCase.description: Whether to consider case when matching header values, `true` for case-sensitive matches.

valueWildcard.description: Whether to interpret `?` and `*` as wildcards in the specified `value`.

oneOf.title: RequestHeaderCondition

oneOf.description: Collects data needed for condition matches on client lists and network lists.

checkIps.description: __Read-only__ Whether the connecting IP or both the connecting IP and `X-Forwarded-For` (XFF) header match on the client list or network list. Behavioral DDoS bypass supports `connecting` only.

className.description: Choose `NetworkListCondition` to match the requesting client's identifier, like IP, GEO, ASN or TLS fingerprint, against the specified client or network list. The only currently supported syntax is `NetworkListCondition`.

positiveMatch.description: __Read-only__ Whether the condition triggers on a match or lack of match.

value.description: Identifies the client list or network list.

oneOf.title: NetworkListCondition

createDate.description: __Read-only__ The ISO 8601 timestamp when you created the Behavioral DDoS profile.

createdBy.description: __Read-only__ The username of the person who created the Behavioral DDoS profile.

exceptions.description: The hostname and path pairs excluded from Behavioral DDoS mitigation actions.

items.description: The hostname and path pair combinations excluded from Behavioral DDoS mitigation actions.

hosts.description: Hostnames in host and path pairs to exclude.

paths.description: Paths in host and path pairs to exclude.

hostnames.description: The hostnames that you want to be protected by the Behavioral DDoS profile.

profileId.description: __Read-only__ Uniquely identifies the Behavioral DDoS profile.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level, specify `CONSERVATIVE` to provide tolerance for more substantial traffic deviations, `MODERATE` to provide tolerance for traffic fluctuations, or `STRICT` for high-security environments, where minor deviations in traffic might signal a potential DDoS attack.

sensitivityOverrides.description: Sensitivity overrides for one or more hostname and path pairs.

items.description: Hostnames and path, overriding the global sensitivity setting.

host.description: Hostname in host and path pair to override.  Wildcards are allowed (`*` and `?`).

path.description: Path in host and path pair to override.  Wildcards are allowed (`*` and `?`).

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level, specify `CONSERVATIVE` to provide tolerance for more substantial traffic deviations, `MODERATE` to provide tolerance for traffic fluctuations, or `STRICT` or high-security environments, where minor deviations in traffic might signal a potential DDoS attack.

suspend.description: Temporarily disable mitigation for a specific hostname, with the flexibility to choose the duration of its suspension.

fromDate.description: The start ISO 8601 timestamp of suspension.

hostnames.description: Hostnames to suspend for a specified duration.

toDate.description: The end ISO 8601 timestamp of suspension.

updateDate.description: __Read-only__ The ISO 8601 timestamp when you last updated the Behavioral DDoS profile.

updatedBy.description: __Read-only__ Username who last updated the Behavioral DDoS profile.

used.description: __Read-only__ Whether you're currently using the Behavioral DDoS profile.
